case_title: S & C MOTORS INC. VS TALBOT, MICHAEL A.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S & C MOTORS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TALBOT, MICHAEL A. $811.46 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $811.46 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTF-DEFT AGREEMENT ENTERED INTO BY DEFT'S SPOUSE TONI TALBOT WHO APPEARED ON BEHALF OF DEFT.PLTF AGREED TO WAIVE COSTS AS LONG AS DEFT COMPLIED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $811.46 FILED BY S & C MOTORS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TALBOT, MICHAEL A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TALBOT, MICHAEL A.
